title: symphytum hirsutum
intro: Symphytum hirsutum, also known as hairy comfrey, is a perennial herb native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It is a member of the borage family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Symphytum hirsutum include wound healing, reduction of bone and muscle pain, and improvement of digestive health. Herbal preparations of Symphytum hirsutum can be made into teas, tinctures, salves, and ointments, and it is often used topically to soothe skin irritations and promote tissue repair.
